observations.summary: The pulsing crimson coals at the hearth mirror the exhausted and faint threads, symbolizing a shared motif of fading life and tenuous warmth in darkness.

source_evidence.quote: The coals pulsed—crimson like the threads, exhausted and faint in the surrounding dark.

observations.summary: The Zuna stone, cool against the ribs and found unconsciously by the hand, echoes the motif of familiar, grounding objects providing comfort amidst darkness and exhaustion.

source_evidence.quote: Cool against his ribs hung the Zuna stone. He didn't reach for it consciously. His hand simply found it the way a hand finds familiar things in darkness.

observations.target_hint: The Zuna stone as a recurring symbol of hope and grounding in Dan's journey.
